creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to crypt47 from comment #26)
I don't know of any diagrams except the one in the ipfw man page, in the packet flows section.  I've been staring at the ipfw code for a while, especially anything related to link-layer processing, without any luck so far.

Are you able to verify that the crashes go away if you disable ipfw entirely?
